info.name: BusMind Service B
info.description: 服务端工程师 B：ETA、客载状态预测、步行时长、出行体验推荐、DeepSeek AI 助手，以及车辆状态/预测结果/LTA Bus Arrival 更新接口。

exec: pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Business request succeeded', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('success'); });

pm.test('ETA fields valid', function () { const d=pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d.predicted_eta_minutes).to.be.at.least(0); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('arrival_time'); pm.expect(d).to.have.property('model_version'); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Returns business error 40002', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(400); pm.expect(pm.response.json().code).to.eql(40002); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Business request succeeded', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('success'); });

pm.test('Load result enum and range', function () { const d=pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(['seats_available','standing_available','limited_standing']).to.include(d.predicted_load_level); pm.expect(d.predicted_load_rate).to.be.within(0,1); pm.expect(d.load_score).to.be.within(0,100); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Business request succeeded', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('success'); });
pm.test('Walking result non-negative', function () { const d=pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d.walk_distance_meters).to.be.at.least(0); pm.expect(d.walk_time_minutes).to.be.at.least(0); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Business request succeeded', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('success'); });

pm.test('Document example scores', function () { const d=pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d.load_score).to.eql(58); pm.expect(d.walk_score).to.eql(84); pm.expect(d.transfer_score).to.eql(100); pm.expect(d.experience_score).to.eql(74.2); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Returns 40002', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(400); pm.expect(pm.response.json().code).to.eql(40002); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Business request succeeded', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('success'); });

pm.test('Recommendation IDs exist', function () { const d=pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d.items).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; pm.expect(d.best_experience_route_id).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(d.fastest_route_id).to.be.a('string'); });
const data=pm.response.json().data; pm.environment.set('recommend_context', JSON.stringify(data)); pm.environment.set('best_route_id', data.best_experience_route_id);
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Business request succeeded', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('success'); });
pm.test('All routes have zero transfer', function () { pm.response.json().data.items.forEach(x => pm.expect(x.transfer_count).to.eql(0)); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Business request succeeded', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('success'); });
pm.test('AI response fields', function () { const d=pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d.answer).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(d.fallback).to.be.a('boolean'); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Business request succeeded', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.message).to.eql('success'); });
pm.test('Explain answer present', function () { const d=pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(d.answer).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(d.related_routes).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Vehicle update succeeded', function () { const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.data.vehicle_id).to.eql(Number(pm.environment.get('vehicle_id'))); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('ETA result stored', function () { const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.data.prediction_type).to.eql('eta'); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });
pm.test('Load result stored', function () { const j=pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.data.prediction_type).to.eql('passenger_load'); });
pm.test('HTTP status is expected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 400, 404, 422, 503]); });
pm.test('Unified response envelope', function () { const j = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(j).to.have.all.keys('code','message','data','trace_id','timestamp'); });

pm.test('LTA refresh response', function () { const j=pm.response.json(); if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); pm.expect(j.data.source).to.eql('lta_bus_arrival'); } else { pm.expect(j.code).to.be.oneOf([40410,50320,50321]); } });
